metadata.name: BillingToAssets_MappingDataFlow
metadata.description: Satsuma: billing_api_customer -> sf_asset. Handles nested subscriptions (each), KD-REF crosswalk join, orphan routing, Status derivation.
metadata.compliance_notes: MRR__c is EUR-only; orphans (~0.4%) route to remediation queue

sinks.name: SfAssetSink
sinks.description: Salesforce Asset object (one per billing subscription)

sinks.name: OrphanQueue
sinks.description: Orphaned billing records (~0.4%) that failed KD-REF join; route to manual review

transformations.name: ExpandSubscriptions
transformations.description: Flatten billing_api_customer.subscriptions (list_of record) into rows. Each subscription becomes one asset.

transformations.name: JoinKdRef
transformations.description: Left join: subscriptions.customer_ref -> KD-REF -> KD_NR. Separate orphans (no match).

transformations.name: DeriveStatusFromCancelledDate
transformations.description: IF cancelled_on IS NULL THEN 'Active' ELSE 'Cancelled'. Transform: "If @.cancelled_on is null then Active else Cancelled"

transformations.name: DerivedFieldMappings
transformations.description: Derive additional SF fields: Name (from product + contract), PurchaseDate, UsageEndDate, Price, Quantity.

transformations.name: FilterValidAssets
transformations.description: Remove nulls in required fields (SerialNumber, Product_Code__c); flag for remediation if present.

transformations.name: SelectAndMap
transformations.description: Final select: map source columns to target sf_asset fields.

transformations.name: IdentifyOrphans
transformations.description: Split stream: rows with no KD_NR match -> OrphanQueue; rows with KD_NR -> SfAssetSink.

typeProperties.script:
source(output(
    customer_ref as string,
    payment_status as string,
    subscriptions as (contract_no as string, product_code as string, mrr_eur as decimal(10,2), started_on as date, cancelled_on as date)[]
),
allowSchemaDrift: true,
validateSchema: false,
ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> BillingApiSource

source(output(
    customer_ref as string,
    kd_nr as int
),
allowSchemaDrift: true,
validateSchema: false) ~> KdRefCrosswalk

BillingApiSource
    flt(subscriptions) ~> ExpandSubscriptions

ExpandSubscriptions, KdRefCrosswalk
    ExpandSubscriptions@customer_ref == KdRefCrosswalk@customer_ref
    (left) ~> JoinKdRef

JoinKdRef
    derive(
        Status = case(
            isNull(cancelled_on), 'Active',
            'Cancelled'
        )
    ) ~> DeriveStatusFromCancelledDate

DeriveStatusFromCancelledDate
    derive(
        Name = concat(product_code, '-', contract_no),
        PurchaseDate = started_on,
        UsageEndDate = cancelled_on,
        Quantity = 1.0,
        Price = mrr_eur,
        SerialNumber = contract_no
    ) ~> DerivedFieldMappings

DerivedFieldMappings
    filter(
        !isNull(SerialNumber) &&
        !isNull(product_code)
    ) ~> FilterValidAssets

FilterValidAssets
    select(
        product_code as Product_Code__c,
        contract_no as SerialNumber,
        mrr_eur as MRR__c,
        Name as Name,
        Status as Status,
        PurchaseDate as PurchaseDate,
        UsageEndDate as UsageEndDate,
        Price as Price,
        Quantity as Quantity,
        kd_nr as AccountKdNr,
        payment_status as PaymentStatus
    ) ~> SelectAndMap

SelectAndMap
    split(
        !isNull(AccountKdNr),
        disjoint: false
    ) ~> IdentifyOrphans

IdentifyOrphans@true ~> SfAssetSink
IdentifyOrphans@false ~> OrphanQueue

metadata.description: Name of the Azure Data Factory instance
